news.summary: A leading brand known for its ready-to-eat beans, rice, and seasoning sauces inspired by Creole, Caribbean, and Latin American recipes, A Dozen Cousins, has been acquired by Verde Valle Foods, an established company in the US for over 16 years, specializing in manufacturing, selling, and distributing rice and beans. Verde Valle Foods also owns Isadora, a renowned brand offering ready-to-eat beans and authentic Mexican meals in pouches. This acquisition marks a significant development in the industry, bringing together two key players in the market.
news.headline: Verde Valle Foods acquires A Dozen Cousins, a ready-to-eat beans brand, specializing in Creole, Caribbean, and Latin American recipes.

news.summary: A significant win for Zest Labs, Inc. against Walmart has been secured by Bartko Pavia LLP's trial team, spearheaded by Patrick M. Ryan, based in Little Rock, Arkansas. This victory has garnered attention due to its groundbreaking nature, and underscores the prowess of the legal team. The successful outcome signifies a milestone for Zest Labs, Inc. and serves as a testament to the expertise and dedication of Bartko Pavia LLP. The specifics of the case, including key figures and details of the win, underscore the importance and impact of this development in the legal realm.
news.headline: Bartko Pavia's Patrick M. Ryan secures $222M jury verdict for Zest Labs, Inc. against Walmart in Arkansas.

news.summary: In Toronto, Scene+ and Recipe Unlimited, Canada’s biggest full-service restaurant company, have recently renewed their partnership. This agreement ensures Recipe Unlimited stays as the sole dining partner for Scene+, enabling its 15 million members to earn and use Scene+ points at over 700 Recipe restaurant venues nationwide. The partnership renewal extends for three years, providing Scene+ members with continued opportunities to redeem their points while dining out.
news.headline: Scene+ and Recipe Unlimited renew partnership for 3 years, offering 15M members to earn/redeem points at 700+ restaurants in Canada.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, recent data from 2024 reveals that the worldwide CRISPR Market was worth US$2.90 billion. Projections suggest a strong growth trajectory, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.2%. By 2025, the market is expected to reach US$3.21 billion, and by 2030, an impressive figure of US$5.47 billion. This positive trend is attributed to the increasing interest in CRISPR-based gene therapies.
news.headline: Global CRISPR market to reach US$5.47 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 11.2%, from US$2.90 billion in 2024.

news.summary: Amid increasing access disparities, Coral Care offers essential in-home developmental therapy such as speech, occupational, and physical therapy that is now covered by insurance. This beneficial service is being provided by Coral Care, a pediatric therapy platform that is dedicated to assisting families with children facing developmental delays. Reporting from Dallas on May 14, 2025, the platform aims to bridge the gap in access to therapy services and ensure that children in need receive the appropriate care.
news.headline: Coral Care offers in-home therapy in Texas for kids with developmental needs. Includes speech, OT, PT covered by insurance.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Hoover, Alabama, Perfect Game, the largest youth baseball and softball platform and scouting service globally, collaborated with The Sports Facilities Companies (SFC), the top provider of sports and recreation venue management in the nation. The partnership unveiled a new initiative aimed at enhancing the development and opportunities for young athletes.
news.headline: Perfect Game and The Sports Facilities Companies will host a youth clinic with former MLB All-Stars at Hoover Met Complex prior to the SEC baseball tournament. Alabama, May 14, 2025. #youthclinic #SECbaseball #HooverMet

news.summary: In Kerrville, Texas, on May 14, 2025, James Avery Artisan Jewelry has the honor of being chosen as a US Best Managed Company for 2025. Supported by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal, this initiative acknowledges exceptional private companies in the US. The 2025 recipients of this recognition showcase excellence in corporate management and strategy.
news.headline: James Avery Artisan Jewelry named a 2025 US Best Managed Company by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Stimvia, a Czech Republic-based medtech company, announced their graduation from the prestigious Endless Frontier Labs (EFL) program at NYU Stern School of Business. The company specializes in creating a non-invasive neuromodulation device to address overactive bladder (OAB) issues. This innovative technology aims to revolutionize OAB treatment worldwide.
news.headline: Stimvia, a Czech medtech company, graduates from NYU Stern's accelerator with OAB therapy, targets US market.

news.summary: Landrum, South Carolina - On May 14, 2025, FlackTek™, a top player in high-velocity mixing and processing solutions, restated its dedication to American manufacturing. Each FlackTek device is meticulously crafted, engineered, and put together in the United States. This intentional choice underscores the company's commitment to supporting domestic production and jobs.
news.headline: FlackTek manufactures mixing solutions in the USA for global market, emphasizing American manufacturing commitment.

news.summary: The Cyphers Agency, a comprehensive marketing and creative agency headquartered in Crofton, Maryland, is showcasing robust expansion despite a sluggish economy. On May 14, 2025, the agency revealed the welcome inclusion of three fresh clients to its burgeoning portfolio.
news.headline: The Cyphers Agency shows growth by adding three new clients to its portfolio.RGBOI: 3 clients.

news.summary: The Partnerships with Sites Summit, organized by The Conference Forum, is set to tackle the issue of patient enrollment at clinical sites by creating a partnership ecosystem to enhance patient access, enrollment, and retention. Taking place in New York on May 14, 2025, this summit aims to address the unmet needs in patient recruitment in clinical trials. Through this event, experts and stakeholders will collaborate to optimize the process and improve outcomes.
news.headline: Conference Forum partners with Sites Summit to improve patient enrollment at clinical sites, aiming to build a partnership ecosystem for better access. May 14, 2025.

news.summary: In Los Angeles on May 14, 2025, Akatsuki Games, TOHO, and Production I.G. proudly revealed that their collaborative effort, "Kaiju No. 8 THE GAME," has achieved over 200,000 pre-registrations worldwide. Gamers are encouraged to pre-register now to gain access to exclusive in-game rewards.
news.headline: "Kaiju No. 8 THE GAME" hits 200,000 pre-registration sign-ups globally. Unlock exclusive rewards.

news.summary: According to a recent 2025 Vascular Access Devices Market Report, the market for vascular access devices and accessories in the United States is expected to see significant growth, with projections indicating an increase from $6 billion in 2024 to close to $7 billion by 2031. This growth is primarily attributed to advancements in smart catheters and minimally invasive procedures, driving innovation and expansion in the industry.
news.headline: U.S. hospitals adopt safer vascular access solutions, boosting market to $6.9B by 2031, from $6B in 2024 - iData Research

news.summary: A behavioral health practice based in Wisconsin has recently made the decision to switch to a modern Electronic Health Record (EHR) platform with the aim of improving patient care and reducing administrative tasks. Charis Counseling, which has more than 20 clinicians on staff, operates in Wausau and other locations. The transition is expected to drive clinical innovation within the practice. This move was announced in Madison, Wisconsin on May 14, 2025.
news.headline: Wisconsin's Charis Counseling, with 20+ clinicians, opts for ProsperityEHR to boost patient care and innovation.

news.summary: Betterment, the leading digital investment advisor in the United States, has revealed its latest acquisition aimed at enhancing its portfolio management capabilities. This strategic move will provide access to cutting-edge tools for personalized and tax-efficient investing. The announcement was made on May 14, 2025, from New York. This acquisition marks a significant step for Betterment as it continues to solidify its position in the market.
news.headline: Betterment acquires Rowboat Advisors to enhance portfolio management tools for advisors. Largest digital investment advisor in the US.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City on May 14, 2025, K&R Solutions Group declared that its CiCLO technology has effectively decreased long-term microplastic pollution. The company is recognized for creating and setting up printed tension fabric, graphics, and lightboxes, maintaining durability and visual appeal.
news.headline: K&R Solutions Group promotes CiCLO® technology in bio-knit fabric for signage nationwide, reducing microplastic pollution.

news.summary: According to a recent report from Strada and ISG released in Miami on May 14, 2025, there has been a notable evolution in the operations of HR teams due to modern Human Capital Management (HCM) transformation. The report highlights that organizations adopting HCM platforms have experienced a significant boost in the usage of AI and machine learning by 500%. In addition, there has been a 44% increase in various aspects related to HR functions following the implementation of HCM platforms.
news.headline: Report by Strada and ISG shows 500% spike in AI usage and 44% boost in data-driven HR decisions due to HCM transformation.

news.summary: FDB (First Databank, Inc.), a top provider in medication decision improvement, recently received employee satisfaction awards in the San Francisco Bay Area and Central Indiana. The recognition highlights the company's commitment to its dedicated team. The awards were announced on May 14, 2025, in South San Francisco, California, and Indianapolis. This acknowledgment underlines FDB's focus on maintaining a positive work environment, with numbers showing high levels of employee satisfaction in both regions.
news.headline: FDB honored as top workplace in San Francisco Bay Area and Central Indiana for consecutive years, emphasizing employee satisfaction.

news.summary: In Chattanooga, Tennessee, on May 14, 2025, Dynamo Ventures revealed the successful closure of its third fund, reaching $54 million, a considerable increase from its first fund. This expansion highlights Dynamo's dedication to assisting early-stage entrepreneurs in transforming the global goods industry.
news.headline: Dynamo Ventures closes Fund III at $54M, triple the size of first fund, focusing on early-stage founders.

news.summary: A recent report by The Research Insights forecasts that the worldwide Point Of Care Diagnostics Market, valued at USD 47.8 billion in 2024, is anticipated to reach USD 68.5 billion by 2030, with a growth rate of 6.1% CAGR. This increase is attributed to factors such as the growing prevalence of infectious diseases and the demand for rapid diagnostic solutions.
news.headline: Global Point of Care Diagnostics Market to reach $68.5B by 2030, growing at 6.1% CAGR from $47.8B in 2024.

news.summary: At the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders, it was agreed to distribute a gross dividend of €1.90 per share. Additionally, the proposed appointments and reappointments of Directors were approved during the meeting.
news.headline: Bekaert's AGM approves €1.90 per share dividend. Directors' appointments/reappointments also endorsed.

news.summary: Analysis of the BOPP Films Market shows promising growth prospects due to increased demand for flexible packaging and technological advancements in film production. The market is experiencing expansion, especially in the food and beverage industry in the Asia-Pacific region. New players entering the market should be prepared to handle challenges related to sourcing raw materials.
news.headline: Global BOPP Films Market set to reach USD 41.64 Billion by 2031 with 5.60% CAGR. Growth fueled by flexible packaging demand, film tech advancements, and Asia-Pacific expansion. Market entrants face raw material challenges.

news.summary: Chicago-based company, Origami Risk, has been featured in Celent's renowned report on Policy Administration Systems Vendors in North American P&C Insurance for 2025. This recognition in the industry reflects Origami Risk's standing and influence, highlighting its contributions and advancements in the sector.
news.headline: Origami Risk featured in Celent's 2025 report on Policy Administration Systems Vendors in North American P&C Insurance.

news.summary: Proof Mark, Inc. (PMI), a trusted partner and shareholder of Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), released a significant open letter to Salesforce CEO, Marc Benioff. The letter can be accessed at the following links: https://proofmarkinc.substack.com/p/an-open-letter-to-marc-benioff-and https://proofmarkinc.substack.com/p/red-flag-notice-1-sent-to-salesforce?r=578bqc https://proofmarkinc.substack.com/p/red-flag-notice-2-to-benioff-and?r=578bqc. The communication covers various concerns and issues.
news.headline: Proof Mark, Inc. sends fiduciary letter to Salesforce CEO over governance concerns and red flags. PMI is a partner and shareholder of Salesforce.

news.summary: Washington-based CaryHealth has been recognized for its clinical AI reference platform, Clair, which has recently received the 2025 AI TechAward for Excellence in AI Healthcare Innovation. This achievement showcases the significant impact of Clair in the healthcare industry, highlighting its advanced capabilities and contributions to the field of artificial intelligence. The recognition serves as a testament to CaryHealth's commitment to innovation and excellence, solidifying its position as a leader in leveraging AI technology for healthcare advancement.
news.headline: CaryHealth's Clair wins 2025 AI TechAward for AI Healthcare Innovation.

news.summary: Nekuda, a startup based in New York, has successfully raised $5 million in funding. The funding round was led by Madrona, Amex Ventures, and Visa Ventures. The investment will be used to support Nekuda's efforts to develop innovative solutions for online commerce. The company aims to create a robust infrastructure to enable secure and efficient payments in the digital era.
news.headline: Nekuda secures $5M funding from Madrona, Amex Ventures, and Visa Ventures to revolutionize online commerce infrastructure.

news.summary: A recent development in San Francisco reveals that Layer, an AI app gateway catering to game developers, has successfully secured $6.5 million in seed funding. The funding round was spearheaded by Arcadia and an investment firm associated with Riccardo Zacconi, the founder of King.
news.headline: Layer, AI app gateway for game developers, secures $6.5M in seed funding from Arcadia and King founder's investment arm.

news.summary: In Merrimack, New Hampshire, Connection, also known as PC Connection, Inc. (NASDAQ: CNXN), a top provider of IT solutions for businesses, government, healthcare, and education, is marking the 5th anniversary of the IT Superhero Awards. This prestigious awards ceremony recognizes IT professionals who demonstrate extraordinary dedication and prowess in assisting their teams, akin to superheroes. The awards are available to IT leaders from various sectors and sizes of organizations, ranging from startups to large corporations. The program highlights individuals who excel in saving the day with their IT expertise.
news.headline: 5th Annual IT Superhero Awards by Connection honors IT pros going above & beyond to save the day for their teams, open to all sizes and industries.

news.summary: A California-based company, Samaya AI, specializing in artificial intelligence for financial services, has disclosed receiving a significant funding of $43.5 million. The financing round was spearheaded by NEA (New Enterprise Associates) and saw involvement from notable figures in the tech and financial sectors such as Eric Schmidt (former Google CEO), Yann LeCun (AI Turing Award recipient), David Siegel (Co-founder of Two Sigma), and Marty Chavez (Vice Chair at Sixth Street), among others. This injection of capital is earmarked for bolstering Samaya's product development.
news.headline: Samaya AI gets $43.5m from NEA, $ used for AI agent. Support from tech leaders like Eric Schmidt, Yann LeCun.

news.summary: A company based in Plantation, Florida, known as Performant Healthcare, Inc. (Nasdaq: PHLT) specializing in technology-driven payment integrity and analytics services, shared their involvement in the B Riley Securities 25th Annual Institutional Investor Conference scheduled for Wednesday, May 21st. During the event, Performant's Chief Financial Officer, Rohit Ramchandani, will engage in individual meetings to talk about the company's updated guidance and ongoing progress. This news highlights the company's active participation in this significant conference for institutional investors.
news.headline: Performant Healthcare to join B Riley's conference on May 21 with CFO discussing improved guidance. $PHLT up.

news.summary: Press Ganey Forsta, a prominent company specializing in experience measurement, data analytics, and insights, revealed its acquisition of InMoment, a customer experience technology firm known for its proficiency in AI, natural language processing, and diverse industry solutions. The merger of these two organizations, both committed to improving experiences and results for businesses, will result in the creation of cutting-edge experience technology. This move will bring together their expertise and resources to provide unparalleled solutions.
news.headline: Press Ganey Forsta acquires InMoment, enhancing customer experience solutions with AI innovation.

news.summary: The city of Burleson, Texas has awarded Iteris with a $1.7 million contract to implement an Advanced Traffic Management System (ATMS). This initiative aims to enhance traffic control and optimize transportation systems in the area.
news.headline: Iteris receives $1.7 million contract to implement Burleson's ATMS plan in Texas.
